---
title: "TSQ Structural Analysis Pipeline"
author: "Alexander Täuber"
format: html
project:
    execute-dir: project
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# {targets} Pipeline structure 
```{r}
targets::tar_visnetwork(
  outdated = FALSE,
  label = c("time", "size")
  )
```

# TSQ Structural data
```{r}
structure <- targets::tar_read(structure_complete) |>
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::contains("_plot"))

DT::datatable(structure)
```
